NO DE-ESCALATION. Escalation continues:
- Iran fires 7th missile wave at Israel (intensifying despite 'functional defeat' of production)
- Netanyahu explicitly states regime topple objective — removes diplomatic off-ramp
- Israel escalates Lebanon strikes: healthcare center hit (12 medics), Gaza-scale threats via flyers
- Hezbollah activates drone attacks on Israeli territory
- China mediating Pakistan-Afghanistan — only active diplomatic track

SEVEN IMMINENT. ONE CRITICAL. ONE ELEVATED. GLOBAL WAR PROBABILITY 85%.

latest_news.headline: Iran fires 7th ballistic missile wave at Israel since midnight
latest_news.text: No injuries reported in Iran's 7th ballistic missile attack on Israel. Sirens sounded in localities that had not received early warning alerts.

latest_news.headline: Hegseth: US/Israel 'functionally defeated' Iran's ballistic missile production
latest_news.text: US Defense Secretary says combined US-Israeli strikes have 'functionally defeated' Iran's ballistic missile production by destroying defense companies and production lines. Netanyahu simultaneously states Israel 'creating optimal conditions for toppling the regime.'

latest_news.headline: Israel strikes healthcare center in southern Lebanon — 12 medics killed
latest_news.text: Israeli strike on healthcare center in Burj Qalawiya kills 12 doctors, paramedics and nurses. Second attack on health sector within hours — Souaneh paramedic centre also struck, 2 paramedics killed.

latest_news.headline: Israel drops flyers over Beirut threatening Gaza-scale destruction
latest_news.text: Israeli aircraft dropped flyers over Beirut threatening to inflict damage on Lebanon similar to devastation wrought on Gaza. Second such flyer drop.

latest_news.headline: Hezbollah fires suicide drones at Israeli troops in Ya'ara
latest_news.text: Hezbollah claims it fired suicide drones against Israeli troops in the northern town of Ya'ara inside Israel. IDF strikes on southern Lebanon, Beirut, and Beqaa Valley continue.

latest_news.headline: IDF launches extensive strikes across western Iran
latest_news.text: IDF announces 'extensive strikes' across western Iran. New wave ongoing. 7,600 total strikes since Feb 28.

latest_news.headline: Kuwait Air Force friendly fire — F/A-18 shoots down 3 US F-15 fighters
latest_news.text: In a major friendly fire incident, a Kuwaiti F/A-18 pilot shot down three US Air Force F-15 fighters during operations over the Gulf. Coalition coordination severely degraded.

latest_news.headline: China urges Pakistan, Afghanistan to resolve tensions via dialogue
latest_news.text: Chinese FM Wang Yi calls Afghan counterpart Muttaqi, urges ceasefire and face-to-face talks. Chinese special envoy shuttling between the two countries.

outlook:
CRITICAL IMMINENT — Global war probability 85% IMMINENT (Day 16 10:04). MULTI-FRONT ESCALATION:

(1) IRAN → IMMINENT 100 (capped, RISING): Iran fires 7th missile wave at Israel — intensifying despite US claims of 'functional defeat' of missile production. Netanyahu explicitly states regime topple objective. 7,600+ strikes. Multi-axis retaliation continues.

(2) ISRAEL-LEBANON → IMMINENT 94 (RISING): Healthcare center struck — 12 medics killed. Flyers over Beirut threaten Gaza-scale destruction. Hezbollah drones hit Ya'ara inside Israel. Diplomatic track (direct talks) still being arranged but military operations intensifying.

(3) PAKISTAN-AFGHANISTAN → IMMINENT 99 (capped): China mediation active but fighting continues.

(4) RUSSIA-UKRAINE → IMMINENT 82 (stable): No change this cycle.

(5) RUSSIA → IMMINENT 77 (stable): Shahed drone transfers ongoing.

(6) TURKEY → IMMINENT 78. (7) DPRK → CRITICAL 47.
